title: Rapide | Professional Masonry Brush| 115mm (4½")| Large Medium Stiff Bristles
features: Rapide’s Masonry Brush is a popular choice for ALL surfaces. Designed with hardwearing materials, the brush can withstand regular or professional use.

The Multipurpose Brush is long lasting, durable using long length densely packed bristles in the extra wide head for maximum liquid holding capacity. This allows a large volume of paintwork, plaster, sealant etc, spread with a quality finish.

The sturdy plastic-handle block brush and paint pot clip is perfect for those in the construction trade. As you load the brush you'll be impressed by the paint holding capacity. Expect an even coat for an impressive finish.
This brush can be used as an emulsion brush for walls or textured surfaces. Furthermore, it is frequently used as a wallpaper paste brush or plasterer's splash brush.
Achieve an impressive finish on smooth and textured surfaces with all coating types. Ideal for painting sheds, fences & all other timber types. For use with woodstain, creosote & wood preservatives.
description: Hardwearing, pure bristle block brush, ideal for painting, staining, waterproofing and more. Ergonomic plastic handle with stainless steel ferrule and hanging hole for simple storage. For use on sheds, fences and all other kinds of timber. Excellent paint loading and distribution. Handy paint pot clip for temporary breaks in use, preventing accidental markis on the floor and your surroundings. Store with Bristles flat to prevent distortion and maintain bristle quality.
